summary: Add HydrateDocumentsFromAPI that pages /v2/get-documents (existing internalapi.GetDocuments) and stuffs the results into cache.Documents before SyncFromCache upserts. sync_cache.go calls the hydrate before opening the store; the API error is surfaced as a non-fatal warning so cache-sourced state (transcripts/folders/recipes/panels/chats) still lands when the API is down. Fix in same file: openGranolaCache used to pass the plaintext path to LoadCache, bypassing the resolver - changed to pass empty string so the resolver picks the .enc file.
reason: Granola desktop moved meeting documents out of cache-v6.json at the same time as the encryption rollout. Without this, even successfully decrypted cache contains 0 documents; every meetings-list command returns empty. The existing internalapi.go already had GetDocuments; this PR wires it into sync.
